notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Corbin Carroll triples (6) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Harrison Bader. Corbin Carroll scores. Throwing error by second baseman Luis Arraez.

notableEvents.label: Gabriel Moreno GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Gabriel Moreno grounds into a double play, shortstop Willy Adames to first baseman Rafael Devers. Lourdes Gurriel Jr. out at 2nd. Gabriel Moreno out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Adrian Del Castillo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Adrian Del Castillo grounds into a double play, second baseman Luis Arraez to shortstop Willy Adames to pitcher Keaton Winn. Gabriel Moreno out at 2nd. Adrian Del Castillo out at 1st.
